mapper.select: SELECT ct.thread_id, CASE WHEN ct.member1_id = #{memberId} THEN ct.member1_id ELSE ct.member2_id END AS member_id, CASE WHEN ct.member1_id = #{memberId} THEN ct.member2_id ELSE ct.member1_id END AS other_member_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages cm WHERE cm.thread_id = ct.thread_id AND cm.read_at IS NULL AND cm.sender_id != #{memberId}) AS unread_count FROM chat_threads ct WHERE ct.member1_id = #{memberId} OR ct.member2_id = #{memberId}
